text: The following week. Dirtus has been in preparation phase for eleven days. Today he arrives with something large under a cloth.

speaker: Dirtus
text: Each of us writes one poem per week, for four weeks. The poems build on each other — each one responds to the one before it. Together they form a complete summoning text.

speaker: Dirtus
text: The worm came to the circle because we made the right kind of noise together. The Relay is the same idea but amplified. Four people, four weeks, one coherent ritual text.

speaker: Dirtus
text: And then, at the end of the four weeks—

speaker: Dirtus
text: Slide nine is the Full Convergence Event.
He removes the cloth. Beneath it is a new, larger version of the Scathagram — this one has all five names in the circle. Yours is there. He added it.

speaker: Mawla
text: You put [player]'s name in the ritual diagram without asking.

speaker: Dirtus
text: I was going to ask today. Retroactively.

speaker: Dirtus
text: Scatha works on a different timeline.

speaker: Vermia
text: I love the Relay concept. I want to do it. But [player] gets a vote. Everyone does.

options.label: I'm in. Let's do the full Relay.
I want to understand more first.
This feels like it's going somewhere intense.
